# Pull Request
**Describe your changes**
A clear and concise description of what the PR changes.

**Fixes Issue:** #[Issue Number]

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles correctly (`npm run type-check`).
- [ ] Linter passes (`npm run lint`).
- [ ] Automated tests pass (`npm run test`).
- [ ] Vercel Build passes (`npm run build`).
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
- [ ] New components match `tailwind.config.ts` semantic tokens.

## AI Agent Notice
If this PR is authored by an AI Agent, verify that `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated with the change and `AGENTS.md` rules were followed.
